title: Aureline AI multi-file patch review summary, validation attachment, approval, and apply-audit contract
description: Boundary schema for the patch_review_summary_record, patch_validation_summary_record, patch_review_approval_record, patch_apply_audit_record, and patch_review_audit_event_record frozen in artifacts/ai/multifile_patch_review_sequence.md. This schema freezes the request-to-apply path for AI-generated multi-file workspace patches so (1) policy evaluation, review presentation, and undo/checkpoint capture are structurally required before any live-tree mutation is claimed, (2) validation evidence is attributable to the exact proposed patch via a content-addressed patch digest, and (3) the apply audit record can prove that only approved diff hunks reached the live tree even when a proposal originally covered broader scope. The schema composes with (and does not replace) schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json (prompt_composer_turn_draft_record, ai_context_assembly_record, ai_tool_call_lineage_record), schemas/ai/evidence_packet.schema.json (ai_evidence_packet_record), schemas/ai/provider_route_receipt.schema.json and schemas/ai/spend_receipt.schema.json (provider/model/route/spend truth), schemas/ux/interaction_safety.schema.json (preview/apply/validate/keep-or-revert phases and basis-drift denial), schemas/workspace/mutation_journal.schema.json (mutation group + checkpoint refs), schemas/integration/approval_ticket.schema.json (approval ticket), and schemas/security/audit_stream_record.schema.json (security audit stream entries). Raw patch bodies, raw diff text, raw prompt text, raw file bodies, raw terminal/log bodies, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, and raw credential material MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema; records carry opaque refs, typed vocabularies, digests, and redaction-aware reviewable labels only. Adding a new enum member, a new optional field, or a new sub-record kind is additive-minor and bumps patch_review_summary_schema_version; repurposing an existing member is breaking and requires a new decision row.

patch_review_summary_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this patch review summary/approval/audit vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / evidence packets / support bundles. Raw bodies, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw diff text, raw prompt text, and raw credential material never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Redaction-aware short sentence safe for review surfaces, support export, and audit trails. Must not include raw prompt text, raw diff bodies, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, or raw credential material.

digest_sha256.description: Hash-algorithm-prefixed digest. Patch bodies and diff hunks are content-addressed; the raw bytes never cross this boundary.

trust_state.description: Workspace trust state at mint time (ADR-0018).

execution_context_id.description: ADR-0009 execution-context id when the record was minted inside a live execution. Omitted when minted outside a live execution context.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. Revalidated on every approval/apply attempt; silent replay against a changed policy epoch is forbidden.

client_scope.description: Client-scope vocabulary re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011).

freshness_class.description: Freshness-class vocabulary re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011).

redaction_class.description: Redaction-class vocabulary re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011).

patch_intent_class.description: Frozen patch-intent vocabulary. Names why the patch flow was started without embedding raw prompt text.

proposal_state_class.description: Frozen proposal-state vocabulary. proposal_ready_for_review is the only state that can be approved for apply.

patch_format_class.description: Frozen patch-format vocabulary. unified_diff is the only seeded format for this protected apply path; other formats require an explicit expansion decision.

blocked_reason_class.description: Frozen blocked-reason vocabulary for patch members that are present in the proposal but cannot be included in the applyable scope on this client/policy/trust posture.

file_id_ref.description: Opaque file identity ref. Never a raw absolute path.

byte_delta_estimate.description: Optional estimated byte delta (additions minus deletions) for the file. May be null when unknown.

patch_file_row.description: Per-file row in a patch proposal inventory.

preview_anchor_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to a diff-hunk anchor identity used by review surfaces (for example a review_diff_hunk_target or equivalent).

line_span.description: Approximate post-normalization line span for the hunk in the target file. Coordinates are review aids only; the digest is the authority.

patch_hunk_row.description: Per-hunk row in a patch proposal inventory. The hunk digest is content-addressed; raw patch text never crosses this boundary.

blocked_member_row.description: Blocked-member rollup row. Carries typed reasons and opaque member identity refs.

turn_draft_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the prompt_composer_turn_draft_record that initiated the review-handoff patch flow.

evidence_packet_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the ai_evidence_packet_record covering the provider run that produced the proposal (or the last successful run prior to a policy-blocked refresh).

patch_format.description: Null when no patch body exists (provider failure or policy block).

patch_artifact_ref.description: Opaque ref to a content-addressed patch artifact (diff body) stored in the evidence/support cache. Null when proposal_state is not proposal_ready_for_review.

patch_artifact_digest.description: Digest of the patch artifact body. Null when proposal_state is not proposal_ready_for_review.

validation_summary_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to patch_validation_summary_record instances that bind validation evidence to this patch digest. Empty when validation did not run.

updated_at.description: Optional monotonic timestamp for a benign re-render or summary-field refresh. Proposal content (patch digest, hunk inventory) must never change in place; replacements mint a new patch_review_summary_id.

allOf.description: Only proposal_ready_for_review records may carry a patch digest and patch artifact ref.

patch_review_summary_record.description: Frozen review packet summary for one AI multi-file patch proposal. The record is minted before any approval or apply; it pins patch digest + hunk inventory so later validation, approval, apply, undo, and audit can prove lineage.

validation_kind_class.description: Frozen validation-kind vocabulary for patch validation attachments.

validation_outcome_class.description: Frozen validation-outcome vocabulary. unknown_requires_review fails closed and must not be rendered as a pass.

tool_call_lineage_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to ai_tool_call_lineage_record rows (context-assembly contract) that executed the validation tool calls.

run_summary_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to execution summary records (for example test_run_summary_record ids). Empty when the validation kind cannot produce a run summary on this client.

validation_attempt_row.description: One attempted validation row bound to a patch proposal.

validation_rollup_class.description: Frozen validation rollup vocabulary for a patch proposal's attached validation.

patch_validation_summary_record.description: Validation summary attachment for a specific patch proposal. The patch digest is required so validation cannot be cited as generic background evidence for a different proposal.

approval_action_class.description: Frozen approval-action vocabulary. Only the approve_* actions can be used as inputs to an apply attempt.

approval_scope_class.description: Frozen approval-scope vocabulary. all_hunks and hunk_allowlist are the only scopes that admit apply.

approved_hunk_ids.description: Explicit approved hunk allowlist when approval_scope is hunk_allowlist. Null when approval_scope is all_hunks or no_apply.

approval_ticket_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to an approval_ticket_record required to admit the apply attempt under the current policy. Null when approval_scope is no_apply.

allOf.description: Approve-all requires approval_scope = all_hunks and no explicit allowlist.
Approve-selected requires approval_scope = hunk_allowlist and a non-null allowlist.
No-apply outcomes must not carry an approval ticket or allowlist.
Apply-admitting approvals must cite a non-null approval ticket id ref.

patch_review_approval_record.description: User approval outcome for a patch review summary. Approval is scope-specific (all hunks or an explicit hunk allowlist).

apply_outcome_class.description: Frozen apply-outcome vocabulary. blocked_unapproved_hunks_detected is the canonical outcome when the apply engine detects any attempt to materialize an unapproved hunk.

interaction_safety_packet_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the interaction_safety_packet_record covering preview/apply/validate/keep-or-revert for this apply attempt.

undo_checkpoint_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the undo/checkpoint boundary captured before commit (for example a local history snapshot id).

mutation_group_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the mutation_group_record (schemas/workspace/mutation_journal.schema.json) created by this apply attempt. Null when no mutation was committed.

applied_hunk_ids.description: The exact hunk ids from the reviewed hunk inventory that were materialized to the live tree.

unapproved_hunk_ids.description: Any hunk ids the apply engine observed as attempted-but-unapproved. Must be empty on applied_success.

not_applied_hunk_ids.description: Approved hunks that were not applied (conflict, drift, user cancellation, or rollback). Empty on applied_success when approval was all_hunks.

audit_stream_record_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to audit_stream_record entries (schemas/security/audit_stream_record.schema.json) that cover this apply attempt.

allOf.description: applied_success must not report any unapproved hunks and must cite a committed mutation group id.
blocked_unapproved_hunks_detected requires a non-empty unapproved set and must not claim applied_success.
Any non-success outcome may have a null mutation group ref (no committed mutation).

patch_apply_audit_record.description: Apply audit record proving reviewed → approved → applied lineage for an AI patch apply attempt. The applied hunk set is explicit; unapproved attempts are recorded and must fail closed.

audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the patch-review audit stream. Events must not carry raw patch bodies, raw prompt text, raw diff bodies, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, or raw credential material.

patch_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to best-effort apply is forbidden.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when audit_event_id represents a denial event.

allOf.description: Denial events must carry a denial reason.

patch_review_audit_event_record.description: Audit event emitted on the patch-review audit stream. Used for denial proofs and lifecycle traceability without embedding raw patch bodies.
